params_used.custom_text: // This module compares VPB and VNB to generate HI and LO signals. Upon reset, both outputs are set to HIGH. On each positive edge of the clock, if VPB is greater than VNB, HI is set to LOW and LO to HIGH. Conversely, if VNB is greater than VPB, LO is set to LOW and HI to HIGH. If both voltages are equal, both outputs remain HIGH.
